title: 「Instead 句」句型
titleEn: Using Instead to show a replacement choice or action

omissions: English translations for Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Subject + negative action or rejected choice. Instead, + subject + replacement action.

formulas.formula: Subject + negative action or rejected choice. Instead, + subject + replacement action.

example: Life should not be about others. Instead, it is about how we choose to live our lives.
exampleZh: 人生不應該只關於別人；相反，它應該關乎我們如何選擇過自己的生活。

examples.en: Life should not be about others. Instead, it is about how we choose to live our lives.
examples.zh: 人生不應該只關於別人；相反，它應該關乎我們如何選擇過自己的生活。
examples.highlight: Instead, it is about how we choose to live our lives.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that you did not do A and chose to do B instead, so readers can immediately identify the rejected choice and the action actually taken.
benefits.zh: 清楚表示「沒有做 A，改為做 B」，讓讀者立即知道哪一個選擇被放棄，以及實際採取了甚麼行動。

benefits.en: It makes the relationship between two choices easier to understand.
benefits.zh: 讓兩個選擇之間的關係更容易理解。

benefits.en: It is useful for explaining a change of plan or decision in conversation, work emails, reports and compositions.
benefits.zh: 適合解釋改變計劃或決定，在日常對話、工作電郵、報告和作文中都非常實用。

benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using but and gives your sentence structure more variety.
benefits.zh: 避免反覆使用 but，令句式更有變化。

benefits.en: It helps organise spoken answers: first state the choice not taken, then clearly present the actual decision.
benefits.zh: 幫助口語表達更加有組織：先說明沒有採取的選擇，再清楚提出真正的決定。

rules.en: Instead must be followed by a complete sentence. The part after Instead needs a subject and a verb, although the subject may be omitted in an imperative.
rules.zh: Instead 後面要接一個完整句子。Instead 後面的部分必須有完整的主語和動詞，祈使句則可以省略主語。
examples: I did not take the bus. Instead, I walked.
Incorrect: I did not take the bus. Instead, walking.

rules.en: When Instead begins the second sentence, capitalise it and place a comma after it.
rules.zh: Instead 放在第二句開首時，首字母要大寫，後面要加逗號。

rules.en: Do not join two complete sentences with only a comma. This exercise consistently uses a full stop followed by Instead, although advanced writing may use a semicolon.
rules.zh: 不要只用逗號連接兩個完整句子。本練習統一使用完整句號 + Instead,；較進階的寫作也可以使用分號。
examples: Incorrect: I did not call him, instead, I sent a message.
I did not call him. Instead, I sent a message.
I did not call him; instead, I sent a message.

rules.en: Instead emphasises that the second choice replaces the first: the original action did not happen or a choice was rejected, and another action or choice took its place.
rules.zh: Instead 強調「第二個選擇取代第一個選擇」：原本的行動沒有發生，或某個選擇被放棄，而第二個行動或選擇取代了第一個。

rules.en: Instead, introduces a complete replacement action. Instead of is followed by a noun, pronoun or verb-ing. Rather, generally corrects, clarifies or states an idea more accurately.
rules.zh: Instead, 後面接完整句子，表示第二個完整行動或選擇取代前面的行動；instead of 後面接名詞、代名詞或動詞 -ing；Rather, 通常用來修正、澄清或更準確地表達前面的說法。
examples: I did not take the bus. Instead, I walked.
I chose biology instead of arts.
Life should not be about others. Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.
Ryan cooked at home rather than eating out.

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each item as two complete sentences. Use Instead, at the beginning of the second sentence to show that one action, choice, plan or idea replaces another.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 把每題改寫成兩個完整句子。在第二句開首使用 Instead,，表示一個行動、選擇、計劃或想法取代另一個。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia bought water, not juice.
questions.promptZh: 米婭買了水，而不是果汁。
questions.answer: Mia did not buy juice. Instead, she bought water.
questions.answerZh: 米婭沒有買果汁；相反，她買了水。
questions.highlight: Mia did not buy juice. Instead, she bought water.

questions.prompt: Ben walked to school instead of taking the bus.
questions.promptZh: 本步行上學，而沒有乘搭巴士。
questions.answer: Ben did not take the bus. Instead, he walked to school.
questions.answerZh: 本沒有乘搭巴士；相反，他步行上學。
questions.highlight: Ben did not take the bus. Instead, he walked to school.

questions.prompt: I watched a film instead of playing a video game.
questions.promptZh: 我看了一齣電影，而沒有玩電子遊戲。
questions.answer: I did not play a video game. Instead, I watched a film.
questions.answerZh: 我沒有玩電子遊戲；相反，我看了一齣電影。
questions.highlight: I did not play a video game. Instead, I watched a film.

questions.prompt: Lily chose hot chocolate over tea.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉在茶和熱朱古力之間選擇了熱朱古力。
questions.answer: Lily did not choose tea. Instead, she chose hot chocolate.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉沒有選擇茶；相反，她選擇了熱朱古力。
questions.highlight: Lily did not choose tea. Instead, she chose hot chocolate.

questions.prompt: The beach was closed, so we gave up the idea of going there and stayed home.
questions.promptZh: 海灘關閉了，所以我們放棄前往那裏，留在家中。
questions.answer: The beach was closed, so we did not go there. Instead, we stayed home.
questions.answerZh: 海灘關閉了，所以我們沒有到那裏；相反，我們留在家中。
questions.highlight: The beach was closed, so we did not go there. Instead, we stayed home.

questions.prompt: Tom chose a pencil instead of a pen.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆選擇了鉛筆，而不是原子筆。
questions.answer: Tom did not choose a pen. Instead, he chose a pencil.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆沒有選擇原子筆；相反，他選擇了鉛筆。
questions.highlight: Tom did not choose a pen. Instead, he chose a pencil.

questions.prompt: Why did Ava have fruit after dinner? She chose it instead of cake.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃為甚麼在晚飯後吃水果？她選擇了水果而不是蛋糕。
questions.answer: Ava did not have cake after dinner. Instead, she had fruit.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃晚飯後沒有吃蛋糕；相反，她吃了水果。
questions.highlight: Ava did not have cake after dinner. Instead, she had fruit.

questions.prompt: It was raining, so the children stayed indoors and did not play outside.
questions.promptZh: 當時正在下雨，所以孩子們留在室內，沒有到戶外玩耍。
questions.answer: It was raining, so the children did not play outside. Instead, they played indoors.
questions.answerZh: 當時正在下雨，所以孩子們沒有到戶外玩耍；相反，他們留在室內玩耍。
questions.highlight: It was raining, so the children did not play outside. Instead, they played indoors.

questions.prompt: Dad repaired the chair instead of throwing it away.
questions.promptZh: 爸爸修理了椅子，而沒有把它丟掉。
questions.answer: Dad did not throw the chair away. Instead, he repaired it.
questions.answerZh: 爸爸沒有把椅子丟掉；相反，他修理了椅子。
questions.highlight: Dad did not throw the chair away. Instead, he repaired it.

questions.prompt: Our class did not have a test. We completed a group activity.
questions.promptZh: 我們班沒有測驗。我們完成了一項小組活動。
questions.answer: Our class did not have a test. Instead, we completed a group activity.
questions.answerZh: 我們班沒有測驗；相反，我們完成了一項小組活動。
questions.highlight: Our class did not have a test. Instead, we completed a group activity.

questions.prompt: Sarah is travelling by train today, not by taxi.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉今天乘搭火車，而不是的士。
questions.answer: Sarah is not taking a taxi today. Instead, she is travelling by train.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉今天沒有乘搭的士；相反，她正乘搭火車。
questions.highlight: Sarah is not taking a taxi today. Instead, she is travelling by train.

questions.prompt: Kevin is taking the stairs instead of using the lift.
questions.promptZh: 凱文正在行樓梯，而沒有使用升降機。
questions.answer: Kevin is not using the lift. Instead, he is taking the stairs.
questions.answerZh: 凱文沒有使用升降機；相反，他正在行樓梯。
questions.highlight: Kevin is not using the lift. Instead, he is taking the stairs.

questions.prompt: We will hold the meeting online, not in the office.
questions.promptZh: 我們會在網上而不是在辦公室舉行會議。
questions.answer: We will not hold the meeting in the office. Instead, we will hold it online.
questions.answerZh: 我們不會在辦公室舉行會議；相反，我們會在網上舉行。
questions.highlight: We will not hold the meeting in the office. Instead, we will hold it online.

questions.prompt: You should call the office, not send another message.
questions.promptZh: 你應該致電辦公室，不要再傳送訊息。
questions.answer: You should not send another message. Instead, you should call the office.
questions.answerZh: 你不應再傳送訊息；相反，你應該致電辦公室。
questions.highlight: You should not send another message. Instead, you should call the office.

questions.prompt: The shop no longer gives customers plastic bags. It now gives them paper bags.
questions.promptZh: 店舖不再向顧客提供膠袋，現時改為提供紙袋。
questions.answer: The shop no longer gives customers plastic bags. Instead, it now gives them paper bags.
questions.answerZh: 店舖不再向顧客提供膠袋；取而代之，現時提供紙袋。
questions.highlight: The shop no longer gives customers plastic bags. Instead, it now gives them paper bags.

questions.prompt: Did Emma complain about the delay? No. She calmly asked for an update.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪有否抱怨延誤？沒有。她冷靜地詢問最新情況。
questions.answer: Emma did not complain about the delay. Instead, she calmly asked for an update.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪沒有抱怨延誤；相反，她冷靜地詢問最新情況。
questions.highlight: Emma did not complain about the delay. Instead, she calmly asked for an update.

questions.prompt: Rather than turning on the television, Noah read a book.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞沒有打開電視，而是閱讀了一本書。
questions.answer: Noah did not turn on the television. Instead, he read a book.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞沒有打開電視；相反，他閱讀了一本書。
questions.highlight: Noah did not turn on the television. Instead, he read a book.

questions.prompt: The teacher did not give the answer directly; she gave the class a hint.
questions.promptZh: 老師沒有直接給出答案，而是給全班一個提示。
questions.answer: The teacher did not give the answer directly. Instead, she gave the class a hint.
questions.answerZh: 老師沒有直接給出答案；相反，她給全班一個提示。
questions.highlight: The teacher did not give the answer directly. Instead, she gave the class a hint.

questions.prompt: Ryan decided against eating out and cooked dinner at home.
questions.promptZh: 瑞恩決定不外出用膳，並在家煮晚餐。
questions.answer: Ryan did not eat out. Instead, he cooked dinner at home.
questions.answerZh: 瑞恩沒有外出用膳；相反，他在家煮晚餐。
questions.highlight: Ryan did not eat out. Instead, he cooked dinner at home.

questions.prompt: The team replaced a long email discussion with a short meeting.
questions.promptZh: 團隊以一次短會議取代冗長的電郵討論。
questions.answer: The team did not have a long discussion by email. Instead, they held a short meeting.
questions.answerZh: 團隊沒有透過電郵進行冗長討論；相反，他們舉行了一次短會議。
questions.highlight: The team did not have a long discussion by email. Instead, they held a short meeting.

questions.prompt: The old paper form is no longer used; an online booking system has been introduced in its place.
questions.promptZh: 舊的紙本表格已不再使用，取而代之的是新引入的網上預約系統。
questions.answer: The old paper form is no longer used. Instead, an online booking system has been introduced.
questions.answerZh: 舊的紙本表格已不再使用；取而代之的是新引入的網上預約系統。
questions.highlight: The old paper form is no longer used. Instead, an online booking system has been introduced.

questions.prompt: The bus was full, so Olivia could not get on it and took the train as an alternative.
questions.promptZh: 巴士已滿，奧莉花無法上車，因此改乘火車。
questions.answer: Olivia could not get on the bus because it was full. Instead, she took the train.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花因為巴士已滿而無法上車；相反，她改乘火車。
questions.highlight: Olivia could not get on the bus because it was full. Instead, she took the train.

questions.prompt: The doctor said Daniel should rest at home and should not return to work yet.
questions.promptZh: 醫生說丹尼爾應該在家休息，暫時不應復工。
questions.answer: Daniel should not return to work yet. Instead, he should rest at home.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾暫時不應復工；相反，他應該在家休息。
questions.highlight: Daniel should not return to work yet. Instead, he should rest at home.

questions.prompt: Instead of cancelling the event, the organisers moved it indoors.
questions.promptZh: 主辦單位沒有取消活動，而是把活動移到室內舉行。
questions.answer: The organisers did not cancel the event. Instead, they moved it indoors.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位沒有取消活動；相反，他們把活動移到室內舉行。
questions.highlight: The organisers did not cancel the event. Instead, they moved it indoors.

questions.prompt: The school used its budget to repair the existing computers rather than buy new ones.
questions.promptZh: 學校把預算用於維修現有電腦，而沒有購買新電腦。
questions.answer: The school did not buy new computers. Instead, it used its budget to repair the existing ones.
questions.answerZh: 學校沒有購買新電腦；相反，學校把預算用於維修現有電腦。
questions.highlight: The school did not buy new computers. Instead, it used its budget to repair the existing ones.

questions.prompt: Maya chose to ask for help instead of pretending that she understood everything.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅選擇求助，而沒有假裝自己明白所有事情。
questions.answer: Maya did not pretend that she understood everything. Instead, she asked for help.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅沒有假裝自己明白所有事情；相反，她主動求助。
questions.highlight: Maya did not pretend that she understood everything. Instead, she asked for help.

questions.prompt: The museum offers a digital guide in place of printed maps.
questions.promptZh: 博物館以數碼導覽取代印刷地圖。
questions.answer: The museum does not offer printed maps. Instead, it offers a digital guide.
questions.answerZh: 博物館不提供印刷地圖；相反，它提供數碼導覽。
questions.highlight: The museum does not offer printed maps. Instead, it offers a digital guide.

questions.prompt: Rather than blame one person, Priya examined the whole process.
questions.promptZh: 普莉雅沒有責怪某一個人，而是檢視整個流程。
questions.answer: Priya did not blame one person. Instead, she examined the whole process.
questions.answerZh: 普莉雅沒有責怪某一個人；相反，她檢視了整個流程。
questions.highlight: Priya did not blame one person. Instead, she examined the whole process.

questions.prompt: The council rejected the plan to widen the road and chose to improve public transport.
questions.promptZh: 議會否決了擴闊道路的計劃，並選擇改善公共交通。
questions.answer: The council did not widen the road. Instead, it chose to improve public transport.
questions.answerZh: 議會沒有擴闊道路；相反，它選擇改善公共交通。
questions.highlight: The council did not widen the road. Instead, it chose to improve public transport.

questions.prompt: What did the nurse do when the patient felt worried? She did not rush the explanation; she spoke slowly and answered each question.
questions.promptZh: 病人感到擔心時，護士怎樣做？她沒有匆忙解釋，而是慢慢說明並回答每個問題。
questions.answer: The nurse did not rush the explanation. Instead, she spoke slowly and answered each question.
questions.answerZh: 護士沒有匆忙解釋；相反，她慢慢說明並回答每個問題。
questions.highlight: The nurse did not rush the explanation. Instead, she spoke slowly and answered each question.

questions.prompt: Do not throw away the glass jar; wash it and use it again.
questions.promptZh: 不要丟掉玻璃罐；把它洗乾淨後再次使用。
questions.answer: Do not throw away the glass jar. Instead, wash it and use it again.
questions.answerZh: 不要丟掉玻璃罐；請改為把它洗乾淨後再次使用。
questions.highlight: Do not throw away the glass jar. Instead, wash it and use it again.

questions.prompt: If the main entrance is closed, do not wait outside; use the side door.
questions.promptZh: 如果正門關閉，不要在外面等候；請使用側門。
questions.answer: If the main entrance is closed, do not wait outside. Instead, use the side door.
questions.answerZh: 如果正門關閉，不要在外面等候；請改為使用側門。
questions.highlight: If the main entrance is closed, do not wait outside. Instead, use the side door.

questions.prompt: Take the cheaper airport bus, not a taxi.
questions.promptZh: 請乘搭較便宜的機場巴士，不要乘搭的士。
questions.answer: Do not take a taxi. Instead, use the cheaper airport bus.
questions.answerZh: 不要乘搭的士；請改乘較便宜的機場巴士。
questions.highlight: Do not take a taxi. Instead, use the cheaper airport bus.

questions.prompt: Did the engineers replace the whole machine? No. They changed only the damaged part.
questions.promptZh: 工程師有否更換整部機器？沒有。他們只更換了損壞的部分。
questions.answer: The engineers did not replace the whole machine. Instead, they changed only the damaged part.
questions.answerZh: 工程師沒有更換整部機器；相反，他們只更換了損壞的部分。

questions.answerZh: 報告沒有列印出來；相反，報告改為在網上分享。
questions.highlight: The report was not printed. Instead, it was shared online.

questions.prompt: Grace did not choose the course that met on Fridays; she chose the one that met on Tuesdays.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲沒有選擇逢星期五上課的課程，而是選擇了逢星期二上課的課程。
questions.answer: Grace did not choose the course that met on Fridays. Instead, she chose the one that met on Tuesdays.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲沒有選擇逢星期五上課的課程；相反，她選擇了逢星期二上課的課程。

questions.prompt: When customers cannot use the app, staff should offer telephone support rather than ask them to try again alone.
questions.promptZh: 當顧客無法使用應用程式時，職員應提供電話支援，而不是要求他們自行再試。
questions.answer: When customers cannot use the app, staff should not ask them to try again alone. Instead, staff should offer telephone support.
questions.answerZh: 當顧客無法使用應用程式時，職員不應要求他們自行再試；相反，職員應提供電話支援。
questions.highlight: When customers cannot use the app, staff should not ask them to try again alone. Instead, staff should offer telephone support.

questions.prompt: The hikers returned to the village instead of continuing along the unsafe path.
questions.promptZh: 遠足人士返回村莊，而沒有繼續沿着不安全的小徑前進。
questions.answer: The hikers did not continue along the unsafe path. Instead, they returned to the village.
questions.answerZh: 遠足人士沒有繼續沿着不安全的小徑前進；相反，他們返回了村莊。
questions.highlight: The hikers did not continue along the unsafe path. Instead, they returned to the village.

questions.prompt: Rather than give a quick answer, Dr Lee checked the data again before she spoke.
questions.promptZh: 李醫生沒有立即回答，而是在發言前再次核對數據。
questions.answer: Dr Lee did not give a quick answer. Instead, she checked the data again before speaking.
questions.answerZh: 李醫生沒有立即回答；相反，她在發言前再次核對數據。
questions.highlight: Dr Lee did not give a quick answer. Instead, she checked the data again before speaking.

questions.prompt: The café no longer sells bottled water. It now provides a free refill station.
questions.promptZh: 這間咖啡店不再售賣樽裝水，現時提供免費加水站。
questions.answer: The café no longer sells bottled water. Instead, it now provides a free refill station.
questions.answerZh: 這間咖啡店不再售賣樽裝水；取而代之，現時提供免費加水站。
questions.highlight: The café no longer sells bottled water. Instead, it now provides a free refill station.

questions.prompt: The school shortened each lesson by five minutes without reducing the number of lessons.
questions.promptZh: 學校把每堂縮短五分鐘，但沒有減少課堂數目。
questions.answer: The school did not reduce the number of lessons. Instead, it shortened each lesson by five minutes.
questions.answerZh: 學校沒有減少課堂數目；相反，學校把每堂縮短五分鐘。
questions.highlight: The school did not reduce the number of lessons. Instead, it shortened each lesson by five minutes.

questions.prompt: The hospital did not close the busy clinic. It extended the opening hours.
questions.promptZh: 醫院沒有關閉繁忙的診所，而是延長了開放時間。
questions.answer: The hospital did not close the busy clinic. Instead, it extended the opening hours.
questions.answerZh: 醫院沒有關閉繁忙的診所；相反，醫院延長了開放時間。
questions.highlight: The hospital did not close the busy clinic. Instead, it extended the opening hours.

questions.prompt: The company had planned to move abroad, but after reviewing the costs, it decided to expand its local office.
questions.promptZh: 公司原本計劃遷往海外，但在檢視成本後，決定擴充本地辦公室。
questions.answer: After reviewing the costs, the company did not follow its plan to move abroad. Instead, it expanded its local office.
questions.answerZh: 在檢視成本後，公司沒有按原定計劃遷往海外；相反，公司擴充了本地辦公室。
questions.highlight: After reviewing the costs, the company did not follow its plan to move abroad. Instead, it expanded its local office.

questions.prompt: The committee responded to the complaint by changing the rule, not by defending the old system.
questions.promptZh: 委員會以修改規則回應投訴，而不是維護舊制度。
questions.answer: The committee did not defend the old system. Instead, it responded to the complaint by changing the rule.
questions.answerZh: 委員會沒有維護舊制度；相反，它以修改規則回應投訴。
questions.highlight: The committee did not defend the old system. Instead, it responded to the complaint by changing the rule.

questions.prompt: Rather than promise an immediate solution, Ms Wong explained what could realistically be done.
questions.promptZh: 黃女士沒有承諾立即解決問題，而是解釋實際上可以採取甚麼行動。
questions.answer: Ms Wong did not promise an immediate solution. Instead, she explained what could realistically be done.
questions.answerZh: 黃女士沒有承諾立即解決問題；相反，她解釋了實際上可以採取甚麼行動。
questions.highlight: Ms Wong did not promise an immediate solution. Instead, she explained what could realistically be done.

questions.prompt: When the team realised that it could not meet the original deadline, it proposed a revised schedule rather than making excuses.
questions.promptZh: 團隊發現無法趕及原定限期時，提出了修訂時間表，而沒有找藉口。
questions.answer: When the team realised that it could not meet the original deadline, it did not make excuses. Instead, it proposed a revised schedule.
questions.answerZh: 團隊發現無法趕及原定限期時，沒有找藉口；相反，團隊提出了修訂時間表。
questions.highlight: When the team realised that it could not meet the original deadline, it did not make excuses. Instead, it proposed a revised schedule.

questions.prompt: The new policy does not simply give families short-term payments; it focuses on helping them find work.
questions.promptZh: 新政策不只是向家庭提供短期款項，而是着重協助他們就業。
questions.answer: The new policy does not simply give families short-term payments. Instead, it focuses on helping them find work.
questions.answerZh: 新政策不只是向家庭提供短期款項；相反，它着重協助他們就業。
questions.highlight: The new policy does not simply give families short-term payments. Instead, it focuses on helping them find work.

questions.prompt: The speaker did not repeat the statistics already shown on the slide; she used a personal story to explain their meaning.
questions.promptZh: 講者沒有重複簡報頁面上已顯示的統計數字，而是以個人故事解釋其意義。
questions.answer: The speaker did not repeat the statistics already shown on the slide. Instead, she used a personal story to explain their meaning.
questions.answerZh: 講者沒有重複簡報頁面上已顯示的統計數字；相反，她以個人故事解釋其意義。
questions.highlight: The speaker did not repeat the statistics already shown on the slide. Instead, she used a personal story to explain their meaning.

questions.prompt: The town decided against building another car park and used the land for a public garden.
questions.promptZh: 該城鎮決定不興建另一個停車場，並把土地用作公共花園。
questions.answer: The town did not build another car park. Instead, it used the land for a public garden.
questions.answerZh: 該城鎮沒有興建另一個停車場；相反，它把土地用作公共花園。
questions.highlight: The town did not build another car park. Instead, it used the land for a public garden.

questions.prompt: Life should be guided by our own choices rather than by other people’s expectations.
questions.promptZh: 人生應由自己的選擇引導，而不是由別人的期望支配。
questions.answer: Life should not be guided by other people’s expectations. Instead, it should be guided by our own choices.
questions.answerZh: 人生不應由別人的期望支配；相反，它應由我們自己的選擇引導。
questions.highlight: Life should not be guided by other people’s expectations. Instead, it should be guided by our own choices.
